zh.Crickhowell Castle, Crug Hywell, Brychei: 英國威爾斯布雷康史爾可利可維爾
zh.lifeSummary: Sir Robert De Turberville於1040年出生在法國。他與Gwenllian Gruffydd verch Hywel of Wales結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1121年在英國威爾斯布雷康史爾可利可維爾享年81歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Turberville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, probably from Thouberville (Eure), or possibly from Trubleville (Seine-Maritime), both in France. The two may have been confused in surname usage.

variants.name: Torbet
meanings: from the Anglo-Norman and Middle English personal name T(h)urbert, T(h)orbert, a hybrid of Old Norse Thorr ‘Thor’, the name of the god of thunder, + ancient Germanic -berht ‘bright, famous’. The name was probably formed on the Continent; see Turberville .
perhaps in some cases a nickname from Old French and Middle English turbot, turbut ‘turbot’, for someone who caught or sold or resembled this fish.

variants.name: Tuberville
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Turberville  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Turville
meanings: English (Surrey and Hampshire; of Norman origin):
habitational name from Tourville‐la‐Campagne (Eure, France). The placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Thórr + Old French ville ‘farmstead, estate’ (from Latin villa).
occasionally a shortened form of   Turberville  .

variants.name: Troublefield
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Turberville  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: Sir Robert De Turberville was born in 1040, in France. He married Gwenllian Gruffydd verch Hywel of Wales. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1121, in Crickhowell, Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 81.

fr.Crickhowell Castle, Crug Hywell, Brychei: Crickhowell, Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Sir Robert De Turberville est né en 1040, à France. Il a épousé Gwenllian Gruffydd verch Hywel of Wales. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1121, à Crickhowell, Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Robert De Turberville wurde 1040 in Frankreich geboren. Er hat Gwenllian Gruffydd verch Hywel of Wales geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1121 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Crickhowell, Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Robert De Turberville è nato il nel 1040 nel Francia. Lui sposato Gwenllian Gruffydd verch Hywel of Wales. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1121, nel Crickhowell, Breconshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 81 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert De Turberville(은)는 1040년 프랑스에서 태어났다. 그는 Gwenllian Gruffydd verch Hywel of Wales(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1121년 영국 웨일스 브레콘실르 크릭호월에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.
